FFlagEnableEconomicRestrictionForCollect.mechanism: Implements economic rules for collectible items within games.
FFlagEnableEconomicRestrictionForCollect.purpose: Ensures a balanced economy in games, enhancing player experience and fairness.

FFlagFCTransformsDiffCheckOnUpdateGeomet.mechanism: Changes how geometry updates are checked for differences during transformations.
FFlagFCTransformsDiffCheckOnUpdateGeomet.purpose: Improves performance and efficiency in rendering, leading to smoother gameplay.

DFFlagUnlimitedHttpRequestsForRobloxApis.mechanism: Enables unlimited HTTP requests to Roblox APIs in a testing environment.
DFFlagUnlimitedHttpRequestsForRobloxApis.purpose: Allows developers to test features without request limits, facilitating better development.

DFIntPerformanceControlMemoryCriticalBuf.mechanism: Adjusts the size of a critical memory buffer for performance control.
DFIntPerformanceControlMemoryCriticalBuf.purpose: Optimizes memory usage, potentially improving game performance and stability.

FFlagEnableDataCenterIdInBacktraceAttrib.mechanism: Adds data center ID to error reports for better tracking.
FFlagEnableDataCenterIdInBacktraceAttrib.purpose: Helps developers identify issues based on specific data centers, improving game stability.

FFlagEnableFindReplaceAll2.mechanism: Enhances the find and replace tool with more features.
FFlagEnableFindReplaceAll2.purpose: Allows players and developers to quickly edit multiple items or text at once, saving time.

FFlagFunctionDescriptorsToArray2_Staged.mechanism: Changes how function information is stored in arrays for better performance.
FFlagFunctionDescriptorsToArray2_Staged.purpose: Improves game performance and responsiveness, leading to a smoother gaming experience.

FFlagUseDynamicStrokePositioning_PlaceFi.mechanism: Adjusts stroke positioning dynamically in place filtering.
FFlagUseDynamicStrokePositioning_PlaceFi.purpose: Enhances the visual quality of items, making them look better when placed in the game.

FStringFlipTimeStampFastString.mechanism: Optimizes how timestamps are processed in strings.
FStringFlipTimeStampFastString.purpose: Improves loading times and performance when displaying time-related information.

FFlagFixWindowsFullscreenSwitchingMonito.mechanism: Fixes issues when switching fullscreen mode across multiple monitors.
FFlagFixWindowsFullscreenSwitchingMonito.purpose: Ensures a smoother experience when players change display settings.

FFlagFFlagAXLookDetailsBottomBarRobux.mechanism: Updates the bottom bar to show Robux details more clearly.
FFlagFFlagAXLookDetailsBottomBarRobux.purpose: Helps players easily see and manage their Robux balance.

DFIntJoinLimitWin32x64_Staged.mechanism: Sets a limit on the number of players that can join a game on 64-bit Windows systems.
DFIntJoinLimitWin32x64_Staged.purpose: Improves game performance by preventing overcrowding in servers.

FFlagFixWindowsFullscreenSwitchingMonito.mechanism: A staged version of the fix for fullscreen monitor switching issues.
FFlagFixWindowsFullscreenSwitchingMonito.purpose: Allows for testing improvements before full rollout to enhance player experience.

DFFlagEnableFeatureTimeoutMigration3.mechanism: Enables a timeout feature for migrating certain game settings.
DFFlagEnableFeatureTimeoutMigration3.purpose: Ensures players have a smoother transition when game settings are updated.
